name: Bisquick Sour Cream Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the melted butter and sour cream to the Bisquick baking mix.
2. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Do not overmix the batter.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased or paper-lined muffin tin.
5. Bake at 425°F for 10-15 minutes, or until the muffins are golden brown.
